title: Urgency and Frequency - Overactive Bladder
chief_complaint: 45-year-old with sudden urgent need to urinate 10-12 times per day and 3-4 times at night for 6 months. Sometimes leaks before reaching toilet. No pain or hematuria.

hidden_data.urodynamics: Detrusor overactivity confirmed, no stress incontinence

patient_responses.urgency: I have to go RIGHT NOW or I'll leak
patient_responses.frequency: I go 12 times during the day
patient_responses.nocturia: I wake up 3-4 times at night

feedback.incorrect_message: This is OAB. The urgency + frequency + urodynamics confirm it.
feedback.attending_note: OAB: Bladder training (timed voiding), reduce caffeine/alcohol. Solifenacin 5mg or mirabegron 25mg daily. PTNS or Botox if refractory. Good response to treatment in most patients.
